name: Werewolf Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are an innovative biopharmaceutical company pioneering the development of therapeutics engineered to stimulate the body's immune system for the treatment of cancer and other immune-mediated conditions. Our most advanced product candidates, WTX-124 and WTX-330, are systemically delivered, conditionally activated Interleukin-2 (IL-2) and Interleukin-12 (IL-12), respectively, INDUKINE molecules for the treatment of multiple tumor types.
sellsTo: Patients with advanced or metastatic solid tumors
Patients with immunotherapy resistant advanced or metastatic solid tumors or lymphoma

exposures.sentence: We are an innovative biopharmaceutical company pioneering the development of therapeutics engineered to stimulate the body's immune system for the treatment of cancer and other immune-mediated conditions.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 1/1b clinical trial for WTX-124
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 1/1b clinical trial of WTX-124 is expected to be completed in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of Part A of Phase 1b/2 clinical trial for WTX-330
catalysts.sentence: The dose- and regimen-determining Part A of the Phase 1b/2 clinical trial of WTX-330 is expected to be completed in the second quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global checkpoint inhibitors market expected to grow to $55.64 billion in 2028 at a CAGR of 10.1%
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Checkpoint Inhibitors Global Market Report 2024, the global checkpoint inhibitors market is expected to grow to $55.64 billion in 2028 at a CAGR of 10.1%.
